name: @blog/api
description: Workspace tooling for the public/admin blog API Workers and shared core crate.

scripts.migrate:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply blog --local --config public/wrangler.toml
scripts.migrate:remote: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply blog --remote --config public/wrangler.toml
scripts.sql:lint: PIPX_HOME=.pipx PIPX_BIN_DIR=.pipx/bin PIPX_LOG_DIR=.pipx/logs pipx run sqlfluff==4.1.0 lint migrations
scripts.sql:fix: PIPX_HOME=.pipx PIPX_BIN_DIR=.pipx/bin PIPX_LOG_DIR=.pipx/logs pipx run sqlfluff==4.1.0 fix migrations
scripts.build: cd public && cargo install -q worker-build && worker-build --release
scripts.build:admin: cd admin && cargo install -q worker-build && worker-build --release
scripts.bindings:generate: cargo test -p blog-api-core --lib export_bindings && pnpm run bindings:format
scripts.check: pnpm run rust:fmt:check && pnpm run rust:lint && pnpm run rust:check && pnpm run rust:test && pnpm run bindings:check && pnpm run sql:lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run build:admin && pnpm run deploy:check && pnpm run deploy:check:admin
